entries.name: VirusTotal
entries.description: Analyze suspicious files, domains, IPs, and URLs for malware and other threats using 70+ antivirus scanners and URL/domain blocklisting services.

entries.name: AlienVault OTX
entries.description: Open Threat Exchange — collaborative threat intelligence platform for sharing and consuming IOCs, threat pulses, and community-created OTX rules.

entries.name: AbuseIPDB
entries.description: IP address reputation database for reporting and checking malicious IPs. Reports from security researchers and system administrators worldwide.

entries.name: Shodan
entries.description: Search engine for internet-connected devices. Find exposed cameras, routers, servers, ICS/SCADA systems, and track vulnerable services across the internet.

entries.name: Censys
entries.description: Internet-wide scanning platform for discovering and monitoring hosts, certificates, and exposed services. Maps the entire IPv4 address space.

entries.name: GreyNoise
entries.description: Filters out internet background noise (scanners, bots, mass-scanning) so analysts can focus on targeted threats. Classifies IPs as malicious, benign, or unknown.

entries.name: Pulsedive
entries.description: Free threat intelligence platform for enriching IOCs. Tracks indicators, threat actors, campaigns, and provides risk scoring with a community TI feed.

entries.name: ThreatMiner
entries.description: Threat intelligence data mining portal. Search by IP, domain, hash, or threat actor to find related indicators, samples, and report references.

entries.name: MISP
entries.description: Malware Information Sharing Platform — open-source threat intelligence platform for sharing, storing, and correlating IOCs across organizations.

entries.name: OpenCTI
entries.description: Open-source cyber threat intelligence platform designed to collect, manage, and operationalize threat data. Supports STIX 2.1 and integrates with MISP, TheHive, and more.

entries.name: Psbdmp
entries.description: Search engine for publicly exposed paste sites (Pastebin, etc.). Indexes leaked documents, credentials, and code snippets for OSINT investigations.

entries.name: Pastebin (Scraped)
entries.description: Public paste site commonly used by threat actors to share leaked data, configuration files, and exploit code. Third-party scrapers index unlisted pastes.

entries.name: IntelligenceX
entries.description: Darknet and paste search engine. Indexes pastes, dark web markets, leaked databases, and documents. Provides email, domain, IP, and CIDR search.

entries.name: Ahmia
entries.description: Search engine for .onion services on the Tor network. Indexes dark web sites and provides search across hidden services.

entries.name: Torch
entries.description: One of the oldest and most popular Tor hidden service search engines. Indexes .onion websites across the dark web.

entries.name: DarkEye
entries.description: Dark web monitoring and search platform for investigating .onion services, dark web markets, and cybercriminal forums.

entries.name: IPQualityScore
entries.description: IP, email, and URL reputation scoring with fraud detection. Identifies VPNs, proxies, TOR exits, bots, and high-risk IPs.

entries.name: Spamhaus
entries.description: Real-time DNS blocklists (DNSBL) for spam, malware, and botnet IPs. Widely used by mail servers and security appliances.

entries.name: BarracudaCentral
entries.description: Barracuda reputation blocklist for IPs sending spam or malware. Includes the BRBL (Barracuda Reputation Block List).

entries.name: Talos Reputation
entries.description: Cisco Talos reputation center for IP and domain reputation. Provides email volume, threat scores, and network owner data.

entries.name: CRT.sh
entries.description: Certificate Transparency log search engine. Query by domain, hash, or issuer to find SSL/TLS certificates issued for a target.

entries.name: Censys Certificate Search
entries.description: Search certificate transparency logs for issued certificates. Find subdomains, expired certs, and certificate chains.

entries.name: SecurityTrails
entries.description: DNS history and threat intelligence. Query historical DNS records, WHOIS data, subdomains, and related domains.

entries.name: DNSlytics
entries.description: DNS intelligence and domain investigation tool. Reverse IP lookups, DNS history, and domain ownership tracking.

entries.name: MalwareBazaar
entries.description: Malware sample database and hash repository. Share and download malware samples with YARA rules and threat intelligence context.

entries.name: Hybrid Analysis
entries.description: Free malware analysis sandbox powered by Falcon. Submit files and URLs for behavioral analysis with detailed MITRE ATT&CK mapping.

entries.name: EmailRep
entries.description: Email address reputation service. Checks for breaches, social media profiles, disposable domains, and spam activity.

entries.name: WhatsMyName
entries.description: Username enumeration tool. Checks if a username exists across 400+ social media platforms and websites.

entries.name: Sherlock
entries.description: Social media username search across 400+ platforms. CLI tool for finding accounts by username across social networks.

entries.name: Have I Been Pwned
entries.description: Data breach notification service. Check if your email or phone has been exposed in known data breaches.

entries.name: DeHashed
entries.description: Breached credential database search. Search by email, username, IP, name, or password across aggregated breach data.

entries.name: LeakCheck
entries.description: Data breach search engine. Check email, username, or password against aggregated breach databases and credential leaks.

entries.name: WHOISDS
entries.description: DomainTools WHOIS lookup service. Provides domain registration details, historical WHOIS, and reverse WHOIS search.

entries.name: WhoisXMLAPI
entries.description: WHOIS data API and domain intelligence provider. Offers WHOIS lookup, reverse WHOIS, DNS, and domain research tools.

entries.name: Triage
entries.description: Recorded Future Triage — automated malware analysis sandbox. Upload samples or search by hash for behavioral analysis and configuration extraction.

entries.name: AnyRun
entries.description: Interactive online malware analysis sandbox. Run suspicious files in a controlled environment and observe system/network behavior in real-time.

entries.name: Joe Sandbox
entries.description: Deep malware analysis platform supporting Windows, Android, macOS, Linux, and IoT. Detects rootkits, exploits, and advanced evasion techniques.

entries.name: CAPE
entries.description: Config And Payload Extraction sandbox. Extracts malware configuration and payloads from analyzed samples using behavioral and static analysis.

entries.name: InQuest
entries.description: Network forensic analysis platform. Search for indicators, analyze PCAP files, and investigate email-based threats with DFIR workflow tools.

entries.name: URLScan
entries.description: Website scanner and screenshot service. Analyze URLs for malicious content, track domains, and get detailed DOM/network/HTTP telemetry.
